message:
fix(ui): xonas reported issues bundle (#6129)

Fixes #6100, #6102, #6116, #6117, #6119

- Gauge (#6117/#6119): when unit is '%', display the computed
  percentage instead of the raw value, so a 1/1 Healthy ReplicaSet
  renders '100%' on the horseshoe graph instead of '1%'. Non-percent
  uses (GPU counts, etc.) keep showing the raw value.

- useClusterData (#6100): switch the multi-cluster drill-down from
  usePods (default limit 10) to useAllPods (no limit). The 'Pods'
  stat block showed 23 while the drill-down listed 10 because
  usePods was truncating to the first page.

- Alerts dashboard (#6116): the Resolved and Active alert stat
  blocks now open the multi-alert list view (drillToAllAlerts with
  a status filter) instead of the single-alert detail view. The
  single-alert view rendered empty because the aggregate stat had
  no alert-specific fields to show.

- Feedback drafts (#6102): persist screenshots on drafts. Added
  'screenshots' field to FeedbackDraft storing base64 data URIs
  and updated FeatureRequestModal to save and restore them.

Skipped:
- #6070 EventStream 'show field disregarded' — no clear root cause
  from static inspection; leaving open for needs-info triage.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -316,13 +316,21 @@ export function FeatureRequestModal({ isOpen, onClose, initialTab, initialReques
     }
   }
 
-  /** Save current form content as a draft (new or update existing) */
+  /** Save current form content as a draft (new or update existing).
+   * Screenshots are persisted as base64 data URIs (the preview field
+   * produced by FileReader.readAsDataURL) so they survive a full
+   * reload. The File object itself cannot be serialized. #6102
+   */
   const handleSaveDraft = () => {
     if (description.trim().length < 5) {
       showToast('Draft is too short to save', 'error')
       return
     }
-    const id = saveDraft({ requestType, targetRepo, description }, editingDraftId || undefined)
+    const screenshotDataURIs = screenshots.map(s => s.preview)
+    const id = saveDraft(
+      { requestType, targetRepo, description, screenshots: screenshotDataURIs },
+      editingDraftId || undefined,
+    )
     if (id) {
       setEditingDraftId(id)
       showToast(editingDraftId ? 'Draft updated' : 'Draft saved', 'success')
@@ -335,6 +343,14 @@ export function FeatureRequestModal({ isOpen, onClose, initialTab, initialReques
     setTargetRepo(draft.targetRepo)
     setDescription(draft.description)
     setEditingDraftId(draft.id)
+    // Restore screenshots from the draft. We recreate a minimal File
+    // stub (the upload pipeline only needs `preview`; the `file` field
+    // is used for displaying size/name in the uploader UI). #6102
+    const restoredScreenshots = (draft.screenshots || []).map((preview, idx) => ({
+      file: new File([], `draft-screenshot-${idx + 1}.png`, { type: 'image/png' }),
+      preview,
+    }))
+    setScreenshots(restoredScreenshots)
     setActiveTab('submit')
     showToast('Draft loaded into editor', 'success')
   }
